scripts.test: npm run clean:reports && npx playwright test
scripts.test:smoke: npm run clean:reports && npx playwright test --grep @smoke
scripts.test:regression: npm run clean:reports && npx playwright test --grep @regression
scripts.test:azure: npm run clean:reports && npx playwright test --config=playwright.service.config.ts --workers=4
scripts.clean:reports: if exist playwright-report rmdir /s /q playwright-report && if exist allure-report rmdir /s /q allure-report && if exist allure-results rmdir /s /q allure-results && if exist azure-report rmdir /s /q azure-report
